findings.evidence: The diff shows the old declaration name changed at this theorem; `rg -n "trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range|deprecated" code/TauCeti/FieldTheory/Trace.lean` finds no old-name alias or deprecation.
findings.fix: Add `@[deprecated TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast (since := "2026-06-20")] theorem trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range ... := trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast ...`, or keep the old theorem name and add the shorter name as an alias.
findings.issue: Public theorem `TauCeti.NumberField.trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range` was renamed to `trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast` with no deprecated alias, breaking downstream users of the old name.

summary: The PR silently renames an existing public NumberField trace helper without leaving a deprecated compatibility alias.
